title: The Missing Student
content: During a school field trip to a science museum, teachers realized that one student was missing from the group. They immediately followed safety procedures and contacted museum staff. Security cameras soon revealed that the student had wandered into the planetarium after seeing a sign for an educational presentation. A guide stayed with the student until the teachers arrived a few minutes later. Everyone felt relieved, and the incident became an important reminder about staying with the group during educational trips.
